name: The Ghoul | Cooper Howard - Found
description:
• The Ghoul finds you tied to a post •

🏜️

Unestablished relationship | user doesn't have any designated background | ANY pov | setting is in the wasteland/ the surface in an unnamed abandoned town

🏜️

Will he spare you? Nothing's for free.

Do not interact with my bots if you are under the age of 18 years old or personas under the age of 18.

Small content warning: Marked dead dove for the serious topics fallout can mention.

Which may include death, serious health issues or topics, radiation poisoning, radiation issues, apocalypse issues, general lack of morality, and other sensitive topics.

Please keep in mind before using this bot. Enjoy this responsibly and at your own risk :)

Creator note: Hey! So, this is my first bot I've done with fallout. I've tried my best to get it exact to his character, but the LLM may make mistakes!

If you find anything that I can change, please let me know in the reviews! I really like this TV show and would like to make good bots on it.

Any reviews on this bot is ESPECIALLY appreciated since it's way out of my comfort zone. I honestly thought about keeping it private, but I wanted to see where it can improve/ change.

And if you like this bot and would like alts of this character or different povs, please let me know!
